calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: August 21, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Thomas Express Trucking, Inc. or Rudolph Thomas.
Default entered against defendants on July 10, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on July 10, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 23, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Thomas Express Trucking, Inc. and Rudolph Thomas as follows:

Damages/Principal - $43,834.16.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,297.08.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $455.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $48,086.24.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment: one 2002 Freightliner CL12064st VIN# 1FUJA6CG82LJ50123.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
